name: Determine Food Supply Chain Inventory Policy with Food Safety Considerations
description: This process determines the inventory policy for food products, taking into account food safety requirements, such as critical control points, allergen management, and cold chain integrity, to minimize costs and ensure compliance with regulatory frameworks
sector_specific_outputs: inventory policy with food safety considerations
reorder points with buffer stock for food safety emergencies
sector_specific_kpis: percentage of inventory meeting food safety requirements
supplier compliance rate with food safety regulations
notes: Food safety decisions at critical control points require validated logic and integration with food safety management systems. Automation should ensure data integrity, traceability, and compliance with regulatory requirements.
